description: Pinned snapshot of the opensubagents repo stack. Each entry is a sibling repo and the SHA it was at when this manifest was cut. Clone scripts should treat these as the canonical reference points; rebuild the manifest when any sibling repo advances.

repos.name: subagentbriefs
repos.role: PRD + brief shape + first canonical brief
repos.notes: Includes the 323-page Hamster crawl under discovery/.

repos.name: subagenttasks
repos.role: canonical task data model: Zod schemas, JSON Schema, types, fixtures, outcome tests

repos.name: subagenttaskmaster
repos.role: vendored eyaltoledano/claude-task-master with opensubagents rebrand pack

repos.name: subagentarch
repos.role: GraphQL ERD + interactive HTML diagrams + AlloyDB/Postgres 17 Kimball warehouse DDL

repos.name: subagenthtml
repos.role: private fork of anthropics/html-effectiveness; gallery of report formats

repos.name: ts-bootstrap-mcp
repos.role: MCP plugin for TypeScript toolchain bootstrap; ships paired skill at skills/ts-bootstrap/

repos.name: subagentskills
repos.role: catalog of Agent Skills used across the stack; marketplace.json + skills/<name>/

external_workers.name: gh-pr-mcp
external_workers.role: Cloudflare Worker that fronts GitHub Git Data API with a dual-token model; used throughout to push commits without exposing the token to chat history
known_token_constraints: /git/trees blocked on newly-created repos (403 Resource not accessible by integration)
paths containing the substring 'workflows' blocked even outside .github/
Contents API used as fallback cannot set mode 100755
